zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Mathilde d'Artois於1268年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯時，她的父親Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois18歲，母親Amicie de Courtenay18歲。她於1285年與Otto IV Count of Burgundy結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1329年10月27日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年61歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Mathilde d'Artois于1268年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯时，她的父亲Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois18岁，母亲Amicie de Courtenay18岁。她于1285年与Otto IV Count of Burgundy结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1329年10月27日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年61岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦。

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Mathilde d'Artois was born in 1268, in Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois, was 18 and her mother, Amicie de Courtenay, was 18. She married Otto IV Count of Burgundy in 1285. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 27 October 1329, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Mathilde d'Artois est née en 1268, à Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Amicie de Courtenay, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Otto IV Count of Burgundy en 1285. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 octobre 1329, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Mathilde d'Artois 1268 in Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois 18 und ihre Mutter Amicie de Courtenay 18. Sie hat 1285 Otto IV Count of Burgundy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Oktober 1329 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Mathilde d'Artois è nata il nel 1268 nel Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Amicie de Courtenay, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Otto IV Count of Burgundy nel 1285. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 27 ottobre 1329, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Mathilde d'Artoisが1268年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスで生まれた時，父Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artoisは18歳，母Amicie de Courtenayは18歳であった。1285年にOtto IV Count of Burgundyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1329年10月27日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで61歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Mathilde d'Artois(이)가 1268년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아라스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amicie de Courtenay(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1285년 Otto IV Count of Burgundy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 10월 27일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Mathilde d'Artois nasceu em 1268, em Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Amicie de Courtenay, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto IV Count of Burgundy em 1285. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1329, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Mathilde d'Artois родилась в 1268 г. в местности аррас, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Amicie de Courtenay, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto IV Count of Burgundy в 1285 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 октября 1329 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Mathilde d'Artois nació en 1268, en Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Robert II "le Noble" Comte d'Artois, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Amicie de Courtenay, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Otto IV Count of Burgundy en 1285. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1329, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia.
